_doc: Mocks an upload of a scanned lab notebook page (PDF). The platform stores the PDF externally and writes an EVIDENCE_UPLOADED chain event with this metadata + extracted_content (text content extracted client-side via pdfjs).

extracted_content.document_summary: Hand-written lab notebook page 47 dated 19 May 2026. Records the N12 quench run, observations, mass-loss reading, and the next-step plan. Counter-signed by the supervising researcher and timestamped with the iPad's signature timestamp.

pages.text:
p.47 — Vantage-7 / N12 cycle
Date: 19 May 2026
Furnace: held 830 °C ± 2 across cycle, argon shroud OK (P1=831, P2=829, P3=830 °C)
Quench: 200 K/s achieved, bath 20.1 °C ± 0.2
Visual post-quench: matte grey, no surface cracks. Two faint bands upper third — non-penetrating, 5× loupe.
Mass loss: 0.018 g (vs N7 ref 0.020 g; within 0.025 g tol)
N10 ref @ 200 K/s: cracked at 1.6 mm fillet — N12 INTACT (key result)
Next: XRD at 830 °C, confirm γ′ stability for 60 s window. If yes, close N7 hypothesis branch and open casting trial.
Sig: P.R.  ----  Co-sig: S.W.  ----  19 May 2026 14:31 AEST

activities.title: Vantage-7 phase-stability program
activities.rationale: Contemporaneous record of the N12 quench result + protocol decisions; co-signed by supervising researcher.
